channel.title: web on Hugo O Rivera
channel.description: Recent content in web on Hugo O Rivera

item.title: Tutoring
item.description: I am your math, language, and programming tutor Qualifications: I worked as a tutor at the Computer Science department of the New Mexico Institute of Mining and Technology for two years. I have a degree in mathematics and a degree in computer science from the same school, graduated with a 3.5 GPA in 4.5 years. Math, logic, and computer science I can tutor you in most math classes up to advanced mathematical-physics and statistics courses.

item.title: hugo-hugo-coder
item.description: A minimalist blog theme for hugo

item.title: You, Node.js Development, and Docker
item.description: My take on developing Node.js projects using Docker.

item.title: nodejs-api-starter
item.description: Boilerplate and tooling for authoring data API backends with Node.js and GraphQL. A personal fork.

item.title: html5seo
item.description: An HTML5 template containing metadata described by the Twitter card, Facebook’s Open Graph Protocol, Google’s JSON+LD, and HTML5 standards.
